untranslatable_reason: Signal requires microstructure indicators not available: (1) 'fundamental value' as a reference point - no intrinsic value indicator exists; (2) 'dealer long inventory position' and percentile thresholds - no dealer inventory or order flow tracking available; (3) 'bid-ask spread widened >= 125% of baseline' - no bid-ask spread indicator in allowed set; (4) 'trade intensity skewed toward liquidity-demanding buy orders' - no order flow imbalance or buy/sell intensity indicators available. These are specialized market microstructure signals requiring tick-level data and dealer position tracking not present in standard OHLCV technical analysis.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used volume ratio expansion as substitute for spread widening, and price discount (0.985 = 1.5% below) as price fundamental value proxy. However, the core signal logic—dealer inventory accumulation, information asymmetry, order flow imbalance—cannot be adequately represented with technical indicators alone. This signal is fundamentally incompatible with OHLCV-only backtesting.
